strengths: Demonstrates proper bimanual coordination during ring transfers
Maintains stable camera positioning throughout the demonstration
Shows good instrument control and precision during grasping maneuvers
weaknesses: Session appears to be a practice demonstration rather than a timed performance attempt
Lacks clear timing markers for proper FLS scoring evaluation
Training format prevents assessment of actual completion speed and efficiency

drills.name: Timed Transfer Sequences
drills.description: Perform complete 6-ring transfers with clear start and stop timing markers to establish baseline performance metrics.
drills.targets_weakness: Lacks clear timing markers for proper FLS scoring evaluation.

drills.name: Mid-air Transfer Ladder
drills.description: Practice 12 full transfers without touching the pegboard for support, focusing on smooth handoffs between instruments.
drills.targets_weakness: Training format prevents assessment of actual completion speed.

drills.name: Economy-of-motion Rehearsal
drills.description: Execute the complete task slowly with minimal wasted regrasping, emphasizing efficient movement patterns.
drills.targets_weakness: Training format prevents assessment of efficiency.

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your demonstrated technical skills into measurable timed performances. Practice complete task runs with clear timing boundaries to properly assess your speed and identify specific areas for improvement.
